title: Apple cracks down on AI generated apps, removes vibe coding app 'Anything' from App Store
snippet: Apple has removed the app 'Anythng' from the App Store for violating self-containment rules. The company had been blocking updates to the app since December.&nbsp;

title: Govt to electronics firms: Upgrade engineering skills, develop design capacity
snippet: Union electronics and information technology minister Ashwini Vaishnaw on Monday gave companies 15 days to come up with clear product design plans and six-sigma engineering certification programmes, warning that failure to comply could result in incentives being withheld or cancelled altogether.

title: India to ban sales of Chinese CCTV brands Hikvision and Dahua from 1 April: Report
snippet: India will prohibit Chinese CCTV companies like Hikvision and Dahua from selling internet-connected cameras starting April 1, according to a new report. This decision follows new certification rules which were notified in 2024.

title: FASTag annual pass price to go up from 1 April: Check NHAI's new fees and benefits
snippet: NHAI is all set to hike the FASTag annual pass prices from 1 April. The existing price of  ₹3,000 per year is set to be hiked to  ₹3,075 per year.&nbsp;

title: Mint Explainer | West Asia subsea cable threats: What could happen to India’s internet amid Iran war?
snippet: Subsea cables carrying India's data face damage risk in a volatile region. While a total blackout is unlikely, rerouting traffic could lead to noticeable delays for users and businesses across the country.

title: DeepSeek outage: Chinese AI startup's near-perfect record broken by massive seven-hour global outage
snippet: DeepSeek experienced its longest outage as the AI chatbot went down for over seven hours on Sunday. DeepSeek has not disclosed the reason for the outage yet.&nbsp;

California AI order requires firms seeking state contracts to have safeguards against abuse
snippet: California Governor Gavin Newsom signed an executive ​order on Monday ​that requires firms seeking contracts with ​the state to provide safeguards against AI misuse, including the generation of illegal content, harmful bias and violations of ‌civil rights.

title: Quick commerce, restaurant chains firing offers to cash in on IPL
snippet: Amazon Now, Flipkart Minutes and Instamart this weekend launched ‘match-ready’ deals on food and beverages brands with discounts of over 40%, while cafes and chains have kick-started promotions to leverage the high-decibel tournament that started on Saturday.

title: Early-stage funding value ticks up 46%, but numbers decrease
snippet: Investments in startups across seed to series B stages have increased 46% in value terms in 2025-26, till March 27, compared to the previous financial year, despite a decrease in deals to 129 from 192 during this period, according to data sourced from business intelligence platform Tracxn.
